steps.title: Apply the simplification from the given condition
steps.content:
The given equation is $9(4-3x)+2 = 8(4-3x)+18$.

Subtract $8(4-3x)$ from both sides:
$$(4-3x) + 2 = 18$$

Subtract 2 from both sides:
$$4 - 3x = 16$$

steps.title: Compute the target value
steps.content: So $4-3x = 16$. That matches choice D — D is correct.
